name: pnmc
body:
Presentation
============

Pnmc is a small symbolic model checker for [Petri nets](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Petri_net) written in C++14. It uses the [libsdd library](https://github.com/ahamez/libsdd) which implements Hierarchical Set Decision Diagrams.

Features
========

- Symbolic generation of state spaces
- Verification of dead states (deadlocks)
- Verification of dead transitions
- Verification of a subset of the reachability properties of the [Model Checking Contest](http://mcc.lip6.fr)

Additionally, it can generate the state space of a Timed Petri nets using discrete time semantics.

Installation
============

Instructions to compile and install pnmc are given in the INSTALL file.
